_doc: Schema contract between bristlenose.pipeline.render.PipelineView (Python) and the React Pipeline Settings tab (TypeScript). Both sides round-trip this fixture in tests so additions / renames trip a build failure. Established 18 May 2026 for branch pipeline-view-v1. Schema version 1: catalogue + host split, host loopback-only (no telemetry fields).

claude_apple_silicon_keys_present._doc: Common cohort path: Apple Silicon Mac, Claude provider with key, no PII redaction. Anonymisation row dim. Apple FM row 'unknown' on CLI.

catalogue.name: Transcription
catalogue.notes: Auto-detected from your hardware. Local, private, free.

catalogue.name: Anonymisation
catalogue.notes: Presidio runs locally when --redact-pii is enabled.

catalogue.name: Quote extraction
catalogue.notes: Set by your provider choice. Typically the largest LLM cost.

catalogue.name: Apple Foundation Models
catalogue.notes: Availability not detected from CLI; see the desktop app's Pipeline view for status. A CLI probe is planned.
